free_text: Angle and energy distributions of population
probability of level 2+ substates in reactions
Two proton silicon detectors spaced at an angle of
30 degr. were mounted in the scattering chamber.
crystals of NaI(TI) were placed at the bottom and
cover of the scattering chamber. One crystal was 70 mm
in diameter with the height of 50 mm. The second was
a crystal 63*63 had a maximal angle of 24 degr.
code was added. Data presentation was corrected. E-LVL
in sub 003, 005 was replaced by LVL-NUMB. Sub 006, 007
